title: Document balanced associated-dataset curation and score-page dataset visibility
description:
## Summary
Document balanced associated-dataset curation and score-page dataset visibility.

## Purpose
Ensure operators can discover and correctly use defaults, controls, and expected outputs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Public docs use associated-dataset terminology only.
- Docs cover balancing default behavior and `--no-balance` opt-out.
- Docs cover score-page associated-dataset panel and its data semantics.
- Examples are updated and render correctly in the public web app docs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting docs update for balanced associated-dataset curation and score-page dataset visibility.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updated public docs for associated dataset balancing + score-page visibility. Changes: concepts/associated-datasets now documents default-on balancing, --no-balance usage, and score-page Associated Datasets panel semantics (row count + label distribution + legacy stats-unavailable state). methods/evaluate-score now includes --no-balance command example and references the new score-page panel for quick dataset quality inspection.
